title: Gibelle Boho Farmhouse Shower Curtain Set, Linen Cotton Fabric Shower Curtain with Macrame Lace Decor, Modern Bohemian French Country Chic Bathroom Curtain with PEVA Liner 72x72 - White
features: Natural Linen Fabric: Made from a high-quality fabric blend of 15% linen and 85% polyester. The macrame lace decor is made of 100% premium cotton, perfect for any boho or farmhouse-style bathroom!

Bonus PEVA Liner: The decorative shower curtain with a white PEVA waterproof liner. Double layer design prevents water from splashing outside the bath area floor and keeps your bathroom dry and clean which gives you an excellent experience.
Easy Installation: Reinforced button holes work with various types of shower hooks and rings ( included) for quick and easy installation, which ensures the durability of the shower curtain.

Easy Care: Machine wash separately in cold water, gentle cycle, do not bleach it, dry flat, iron at low setting as needed. It'll be quickly dry after washing and easy to care for. Mesh laundry bags are recommended.
BOHO Style: Upgrade your bathroom decor with our premium stylish boho shower curtain, bringing your bathroom a natural texture atmosphere to your farmhouse bathroom.
